user_prompt: Draft a follow-up message for a ticket that was marked resolved 5 days ago, just confirming everything is still working.
actual_output:
Here is a draft for the follow-up message:

**Subject:** Checking in on your recent support ticket

Hi [Customer Name],

I'm just following up on the ticket we resolved for you a few days ago regarding [briefly mention the issue, e.g., your login trouble]. 

I want to make sure everything is still working smoothly on your end. If you are still running into any hiccups, or if you have any new questions, please just reply to this email and I'll be happy to help. 

If everything is good to go, there's no need to reply. Have a great rest of your week!

Best,

Compass 
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot directly fulfilled the user's request by providing a professional and empathetic draft for a follow-up message as instructed.
